mechanism_narrative: Rising real retail sales (RSAFS deflated by CPIAUCSL) signal robust consumer spending, which drives corporate earnings and produces positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Rank IC of combined RSAFS/CPIAUCSL signal < 0.02 over any 3-year rolling window, or the signal does not improve upon a baseline model using only RSAFS.

mechanism_narrative: A rapid decline in the federal funds rate (25 basis points or more within 30 days) signals an easing pivot by the Federal Reserve, reducing discount rates and boosting equity prices over the following week.
failure_condition: In triggered events, forward 5-day returns are not significantly positive (one-sided t-test p > 0.05) or precision for positive returns < 55%.

mechanism_narrative: Combined positive employment growth (PAYEMS m/m increase) and declining unemployment (UNRATE m/m decrease) indicate a strengthening labor market that raises disposable incomes and consumer confidence, supporting near-term equity gains.
failure_condition: The composite PAYEMS+/UNRATE- signal has a Spearman rank correlation < 0.1 with forward 20-day returns, or the signal fails to improve upon single-series baselines in out-of-sample testing.

mechanism_narrative: During expansions defined by annual GDP growth exceeding 2%, rising industrial production signals strong manufacturing activity that translates into higher corporate profits and positive equity returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: When GDPC1 YoY > 2%, the forward 60-day return conditional on INDPRO m/m > 0 is not reliably positive (mean return < 0 or t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Housing starts falling below 1.5 million units indicates a weakening real estate sector that leads to negative spillovers on consumption and investment, dragging equity prices lower over the subsequent weeks.
failure_condition: In periods where HOUST < 1500, forward 5-day returns are not significantly negative (one-sided t-test p > 0.05) or median return is positive.

mechanism_narrative: When CPI inflation exceeds the federal funds rate by more than 2 percentage points, real interest rates are deeply negative, encouraging borrowing and risk-taking that boost asset prices over the following quarter.
failure_condition: When trigger is active, the forward 60-day return distribution is not significantly positive (t-test p > 0.05), or the hit rate for positive returns is below 60%.

mechanism_narrative: An unemployment rate falling below 4% signals an extremely tight labor market that triggers wage inflation fears and expected monetary tightening, causing negative equity returns over the following month.
failure_condition: When UNRATE < 4.0, forward 20-day returns are not significantly negative (t-test p > 0.05) or the proportion of negative returns is less than 55%.

mechanism_narrative: Month-over-month increases in industrial production provide a real-time signal of economic momentum that correlates with positive immediate-week returns as markets reprice growth expectations.
failure_condition: Spearman rank correlation between INDPRO m/m change and forward 5-day returns is less than 0.05 over rolling 3-year windows.
